PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rita Hock in Propria Persona.

Ms. Hock stated that her Mother left two bequests to St. Stephens and Mercy High School, that they are named in the Trust, that she understands what the next steps are, that she probated her Aunt's estate and that she is familiar with the process. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for February 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for October 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
